records.description: Canonical document reference whose full text is owned by a registered source system.
Atomic or transitional learning unit consumed by SSF and other learning clients.
Navigable semantic route or curated sequence. A Path contains no canonical subject-matter content of its own; it connects modules, prerequisites, capabilities or target objects.
rules: Path is a separate entity class and never a learning module meta.type.
A document-reading Path targets exactly one canonical DOC record.
A Path may contain ordered module steps and may unlock other Paths, Documents or capabilities.
PATH system namespace identifies the system responsible for curating the route, not necessarily the owner of the target document.

records.description: Canonical knowledge domain at a defined prerequisite depth.
Demonstrable competency associated with one or more knowledge domains.
Typed directed edge between canonical entities.
Registered KUEPER ecosystem system with an explicit ownership or consumer role.
Registered public or planned internet domain mapped to a system.
